73	def ws_accept_key(client_key: str) -> str:
74	    """Compute Sec-WebSocket-Accept from Sec-WebSocket-Key per RFC 6455."""
75	    digest = hashlib.sha1(client_key.encode() + _WS_MAGIC).digest()  # noqa: S324
76	    return base64.b64encode(digest).decode()
77

79	def ws_read_frame(sock: Any) -> tuple[int, bytes] | None:
80	    """Read one WebSocket frame, unmask the payload. Returns (opcode, data) or None on EOF."""
81	    header = _recv_exact(sock, 2)
82	    if header is None:
83	        return None
84	    opcode = header[0] & 0x0F
85	    masked = bool(header[1] & 0x80)
86	    length = header[1] & 0x7F
87	    if length == 126:
88	        raw = _recv_exact(sock, 2)
89	        if raw is None:
90	            return None
91	        length = struct.unpack("!H", raw)[0]
92	    elif length == 127:
93	        raw = _recv_exact(sock, 8)
94	        if raw is None:
95	            return None
96	        length = struct.unpack("!Q", raw)[0]
97	    mask_key = b""
98	    if masked:
99	        mask_key = _recv_exact(sock, 4)
100	        if mask_key is None:
101	            return None
102	    payload = _recv_exact(sock, length)
103	    if payload is None:
104	        return None
105	    if masked:
106	        payload = bytes(b ^ mask_key[i % 4] for i, b in enumerate(payload))
107	    return opcode, payload
108	
109	
110	def _recv_exact(sock: Any, n: int) -> bytes | None:
111	    """Read exactly *n* bytes from *sock*, returning None on short read / error."""
112	    buf = bytearray()
113	    while len(buf) < n:
114	        try:
115	            chunk = sock.recv(n - len(buf))
116	        except OSError:
117	            return None
118	        if not chunk:
119	            return None
120	        buf.extend(chunk)
121	    return bytes(buf)
122	
123	
124	def ws_send_text(sock: Any, text: str) -> None:
125	    """Send an unmasked text frame over *sock*."""
126	    payload = text.encode()
127	    header = bytearray()
128	    header.append(0x81)  # FIN + text opcode
129	    length = len(payload)
130	    if length < 126:
131	        header.append(length)
132	    elif length < 65536:
133	        header.append(126)
134	        header.extend(struct.pack("!H", length))
135	    else:
136	        header.append(127)
137	        header.extend(struct.pack("!Q", length))
138	    sock.sendall(bytes(header) + payload)

142	    """Send a close frame with the given status code."""
143	    payload = struct.pack("!H", code)
144	    header = bytearray([0x88, len(payload)])
145	    sock.sendall(bytes(header) + payload)

1023	def percentile_ms(values: list[float], ratio: float) -> float:
1024	    """Return a rounded percentile value from a list of millisecond samples."""
1025	    if not values:
1026	        return 0.0
1027	    ordered = sorted(values)
1028	    index = min(len(ordered) - 1, max(0, int(round((len(ordered) - 1) * ratio))))
1029	    return round(ordered[index], 3)
